items.caption: A collection of digital news media, including a tablet displaying a news website and two smartphones showing news articles. the tablet is in the foreground, with the smartphones positioned behind it, slightly overlapping. the tablet screen is visible, showing a news headline with a thumbnail image of a factory. the smartphones are also displaying news articles, with one showing a headline and the other partially visible. the background is a blurred image of a newspaper spread, with the word "news" prominently displayed in large, bold letters. the overall impression is of a modern, digital news consumption environment.
